'''Erg Es 992''' was a [[Star/Legends|star]] in the [[Meridian sector/Legends|Meridian sector]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cybloc]] and its habitable [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Cybloc XII/Legends|Cybloc XII]].
